locators.label: Exact order code, electrical values, body dimensions, and recommended reflow land pattern
Current family status and exact order-code listing

ratings.name: nominal resistance
ratings.qualifier: At the data-sheet test conditions; tolerance ±1%.

ratings.name: rated power
ratings.qualifier: Rated at 70 °C and subject to the manufacturer derating curve.

ratings.name: limiting element voltage
ratings.qualifier: The lower of the calculated rated voltage and limiting element voltage applies.

land_pattern.locator: page 1, recommended reflow land pattern; 0.60 x 0.90 mm pads and 0.90 mm gap independently recomputed to ±0.75 mm pad centers
land_pattern.coordinate_convention: Component centroid is (0,0); +x is right and +y is down in the top view; terminal numbering is arbitrary because the device is non-polarized.

symbol.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
symbol.provenance: Original Lyon Industries conventional resistor symbol serialized from the reviewed exact-MPN record.
limitations: The schematic symbol does not encode tolerance, pulse-loading, voltage, or derating limits; read the record before use.

footprint.tool_version: Component Intelligence native CAD generator 2.0 / KiCad 10 syntax
footprint.provenance: Original Lyon Industries footprint serialized from the manufacturer-recommended reflow land pattern.
limitations: Stencil, solder volume, and process-specific land adjustments remain the responsibility of the consuming PCB design.

step_model.provenance: Original Lyon Industries nominal chip-envelope model generated from manufacturer dimensions.
limitations: Nominal seating and clearance envelope only; termination finish, tolerances, markings, and internal construction are omitted.

packing.method: 8 mm paper tape on 178 mm reel

orientation.description: The resistor is non-polarized; either 180-degree placement orientation is electrically equivalent.
orientation.locator: page 1, schematic and symmetric package drawing

notes: Use the manufacturer derating curve and pulse-loading guidance for the actual ambient and duty cycle.

findings.summary: The 0.1 W rating applies at 70 °C and derates with temperature; pulse energy and limiting voltage can govern before nominal resistance tolerance does.

checks.name: official source identity
checks.method: Captured and hashed the official exact-order-code data sheet and recorded page locators.

checks.name: independent product and package cross-check
checks.method: Compared exact identity, series, size, value, and current family status against the official product catalog independently of land-pattern arithmetic.

checks.name: explicit land-pattern arithmetic
checks.method: Recomputed pad centers from manufacturer pad length and inter-pad gap and checked symmetry, size, and count.

checks.name: native CAD replay and geometry gate
checks.method: Replayed the KiCad 10 symbol and footprint from the record, parsed pin and pad semantics, checked silk and courtyard rules, reopened STEP, and measured seating and envelope.

rights.normalized_record_origin: Original Lyon Industries normalization based on linked official manufacturer sources.
